bg.$description: dark canvas — collage elements pop against gallery-wall darkness) or #FAFAFA (white mount board variant — both are valid; the background is support surface, not content

accent.$description: tape yellow — semi-transparent) used only for the physical tape metaphor element; not a brand color

spring.$description: Motion v12 two-parameter spring (bounce/visualDuration) or v11 legacy (stiffness/damping/mass).

base.$description: Base grid unit (all spacing is a multiple of this).
